global.tituloPorDefecto: AI Robotics — Autonomy and defense with artificial intelligence
global.descripcionPorDefecto: We build drones, turrets and AI surveillance systems designed to detect threats and deploy a response before damage occurs. A Codeplex company.

inicio.titulo: Autonomy and defense with artificial intelligence
inicio.descripcion: Drones, turrets and AI surveillance: we detect threats and deploy a response before damage occurs. Designed and manufactured in Peru.

nosotros.descripcion: AI Robotics is the technology innovation arm of Codeplex, dedicated to autonomous defense with AI.

productos.descripcion: AI Surveillance System, Defense Drone, and Autonomous Turret. Three autonomous solutions with the same AI brain.

vigilancia.descripcion: Turn any IP camera into an intelligent sensor connected to an automated response drone.

dron.descripcion: Autonomous response drone integrated with the AI surveillance system. Designed and programmed in Peru.

torreta.descripcion: Perimeter-defense turret with edge processing. Detects weapons and perimeter-fence breaches.

equipo.descripcion: Meet the engineering, AI and hardware team behind AI Robotics.

prensa.descripcion: Official releases and latest news from AI Robotics: autonomous turret, defense drone and AI surveillance system.

contacto.descripcion: Let's discuss how to apply our technology to your organization. Request a demo, a quote or a partnership.

privacidad.descripcion: How we collect, use and protect your personal data at AI Robotics.

terminos.descripcion: Terms and conditions of use for the AI Robotics website.

libroReclamaciones.descripcion: Electronic complaints book of AI Robotics S.A.C., in compliance with Peru's Consumer Protection Code.
